text: As I stand in this starkly modern space, I am greeted by the bold lettering of R+D and vibrant, abstract colors on the wall. There is something inviting about the concept of rapid research and development, a place where curiosity is encouraged and new connections are formed. The text speaks of openness—both in the mind and in the world. I feel a gentle excitement here, a quiet joy in the shared pursuit of knowledge, and a sense of comfort in being surrounded by so many possibilities.
